texts.howto_subtitle: Flick left/right to move, flick down or touch ▼ to fall faster, touch ⟳ to rotate, touch ⏬ to drop. Reach TARGET points to win.
texts.win_subtitle: Great job reaching the target score!
texts.pause_subtitle: Press any control or press P
texts.how_to_play: Study the board, plan your moves, and solve each challenge before the clock hits zero.
